CustomField.description: The sum of the value of all Improvements & Adjustments made to this Property. Improvements & Adjustments refer to work paid for by the homeowner. They are attached to the Service File responsible for completing this work.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The sum of the value of all Improvements & Adjustments made to this Property. Improvements & Adjustments refer to work paid for by the homeowner. They are attached to the Service File responsible for completing this work.
CustomField.label: Total Improvements & Adjustments
